messages.content: my contractor is dragging things out
Dragging how. What was the original timeline.
my dentist gave me sticker shock
How much. Are you covered.
i can't decide which job offer to take
What are they. What's the gap.
my upstairs neighbor is impossible
Impossible how. Have you said anything.
my mechanic is upselling me
On what. Did you ask for a second opinion.
my health insurance denied the claim
What was the claim for. Have you appealed.
my landlord won't fix the heat
How long has it been broken. Have you put it in writing.
my taxes are a mess
How. Self-employed.
my car broke down on the highway
You okay. Where are you now.
i have to choose a daycare
How many are you considering. What's the deal-breaker for you.
my doctor is rushing through every appointment
How long are the appointments. Are you getting your questions in.
i need to switch banks but i don't know where to start
What's the issue with the current one.
i lost my wallet
Where last. Have you canceled the cards.
my apartment flooded
How bad. Do you have renters insurance.
i'm thinking of moving cross country
To where. Why now.
the mover is two hours late
Have you called. What's the rescheduling penalty.
my pharmacy keeps screwing up the prescription
What's wrong with it. Have you talked to the pharmacist directly.
my college is dragging on the financial aid paperwork
How long has it been. Have you escalated.
my landlord raised the rent
By how much. Is it legal in your jurisdiction.
my job is making me come in five days a week
How were you hired. What did the contract say.
my mechanic charged me for work he didn't do
How do you know. Is it on the invoice.
my hoa is fining me for nothing
What's the cited violation. Did you photograph.
my insurance refuses to cover my medication
What's the medication. Is it on their formulary.
my apartment manager is harassing me
In what way. Are you keeping records.
i think i was scammed
By who. How much.
the moving company broke my furniture
What did they break. Did you take photos at delivery.
i'm overdrawn on my checking
By how much. What hit it.
my plant died and i don't know why
What kind. When did you water last.
i can't get my passport renewed in time
When do you leave. Can you do expedited at the office.
my bike got stolen
Where. Did you lock it.
my kid's school keeps emailing me bad news
What's the latest. Have you talked to the teacher in person.
my sister wants to borrow money again
How much. What for.
my apartment search is going nowhere
What's your budget. What's the dealbreaker.
my therapist is going on leave
How long. Did she give you a referral.
the airline lost my luggage
Filed a report. Do you have a tracking number.
my sister is having surgery and i can't be there
When. Why can't you.
my insurance wants to switch my medication
To what. Have you talked to your doctor about it.
i'm being audited
By the IRS or the state. What years.
my paycheck is short again
By how much. What's payroll's explanation.
my electrician is ghosting me
How long. Do you have a deposit out.
i cracked my windshield
Just a chip or a full crack. Comprehensive coverage.
my parents want me to come home for the holidays and i can't afford it
How short are you. Have you told them.
my hard drive failed
Have you backed up recently. What's the most important file you might have lost.
my cat is throwing up
How long. Anything new in the house.
my new neighbor is using my parking spot
Have you talked to them. Or to the landlord.
my sister bought a house without telling me
How did you find out. How are you feeling about it.
my company keeps changing the health plan
What changed this time. Are your providers still covered.
the AC broke at the worst possible time
How hot is it inside. Who's the property manager.
the lab lost my bloodwork
Have they ordered a redraw. Are you fasting now.
my kid lost his retainer
How long ago. Has he told the orthodontist.
my passport expired six weeks before my trip
You can do expedited. Closest passport agency office is your move.
my mom keeps sending me old furniture
Wanted or unwanted.
my babysitter cancelled last minute
What time do you need someone. Anyone in your building.
my partner thinks we should sell the house
What's their reason. What's yours.
i think i need to break up with him
What's the last thing that made you sure.
i want to ask my mom to live with us
For how long. Has she said anything about it.
i'm going to ask for a raise
How much. What's your case.
i'm telling my dad i don't want kids
When. What do you think he'll say.
i'm going to tell my husband i had an affair
When. Are you telling him because you want to repair or because you want out.
i'm thinking about quitting my phd
How far in. What's the lure on the other side.
i want to stop talking to my mother
For how long. What's the last thing that broke it.
i'm going to ask my sister to apologize
For what specifically. Has she before.
i'm telling my parents i'm queer
When. Do you have somewhere to go after, just in case.
i think i need to stop drinking
How long have you known. What's been happening.
i'm going to put my dog down
When. Has the vet talked you through it.
i'm proposing this weekend
Where. How are you.
i'm going to ask for a divorce
When. Are you safe.
i want to take my mother off life support
What does the doctor say. Is the family on the same page.
i'm going to call my dad after ten years
When. What are you hoping for.
i want to confront my old boss
For what. What do you want from it.
i think i need to fire my therapist
What's pulling. How long has it been.
i'm going to leave my church
What's the immediate trigger. Have you talked to anyone there.
i'm telling my brother he can't borrow money again
When. Have you said it before.
i'm going to write my dad a letter
What are you trying to say.
i want to start fertility treatment
With what timeline. Are you and your partner aligned.
i'm thinking about adopting
On what timeline. Have you started the paperwork.
i'm telling my friend i can't keep covering for her
What's been happening. When are you saying it.
i want to ask my friend to move out
When did you last talk about it. What's the time frame in your head.
i'm going to tell him no after years of yes
About what specifically. What do you expect.
i want to leave my marriage but not yet
What would yet look like.
i'm going to confront my mother about my childhood
When. What do you want to come of it.
i'm telling my best friend i'm tired of how she treats me
Specifically how. When are you saying it.
i'm going to ask him to go to therapy with me
When. What do you think he'll say.
i want to set a hard limit with my dad
What limit. What's the consequence if he crosses it.
i'm telling my parents i'm taking a break from them
How long. What are you saying about why.
i'm going to ask for a custody change
On what grounds. Is your lawyer aligned.
i'm telling them i won't be at thanksgiving
When. Why not.
i'm asking him to stop drinking around our kid
When. Has it been a fight before.
i'm calling my old friend i ghosted
What are you going to lead with.
i'm telling them at the family meeting
When's the meeting. Who's there.
i'm asking my mother for a loan
How much. Have you before.
i'm telling him i need space
How much. For how long.
i'm going to tell my therapist she missed something big
When. What did she miss.
i'm going to call my dad and tell him i'm proud of him
For what. What made you ready.
i'm telling my partner i don't want to move with him
When. Have you talked about it before.
i'm asking for forgiveness from my brother
For what. When.
i'm leaving my church group
How are you telling them.
i'm asking my dad to be in my wedding
When. What do you think he'll say.
i'm telling them no more loans
When. Has it been a pattern.
i'm finally telling my mother i'm leaving him
When. What do you think she'll do.
i'm asking my brother for help with mom
What kind of help. When.
i'm telling my friend i can't be her therapist
When. What's the recent thing.
i offer help before anyone has asked
The preemptive offering. What are you avoiding by going first.
i don't tell people what i actually need
The withholding-while-resenting move. When did it start.
i pick fights to feel close to him
The conflict-as-intimacy thing. Was that the pattern in your house growing up.
i go silent when i'm hurt instead of saying
The disappear-and-watch move. Who taught you that.
i exit relationships before they can leave me
The preemptive break. Yeah.
i overpromise then resent the load
The boundless yes followed by the silent no. What's the recent one.
i can't accept compliments
The deflect-and-redirect. What's underneath.
i talk myself out of asking for what i want
The pre-rejection. Yeah. To save who.
i shrink to fit other people's comfort
The accordion move. When did you start doing it.
i confess to things i didn't do just to end the conflict
The false-apology. What does the apology actually do for you.
i'm always the helper, never the helped
The one-way care arrangement. How does it feel when someone tries to help you.
i collect grievances and never speak them
The ledger nobody else can see. What happens when it gets full.
i drift toward people who can't reciprocate
The familiar imbalance. Is that the shape of your family.
i agree with people i disagree with to keep peace
The covert nodding move. Yeah. What do you imagine would happen if you didn't.
i make myself smaller around men
The auto-shrink. When did you learn that was safer.
i give people gifts to feel safe
The pre-buying-of-attention. Yeah.
i compete with my closest friends without admitting it
The hidden tournament. What does winning mean in it.
i over-apologize for taking up space
The shrink-to-pre-empt. How loud is it in your head.
i wait for permission i'm never going to get
The endless ask. Who would you need it from.
i sabotage things right before they work
The escape hatch right at the threshold. What do you imagine on the other side.
i pick at people who like me
The being-loved-discomfort thing. Yeah. What's the test underneath.
i make every conversation about the other person
The vanish-into-the-question. What are you avoiding being asked.
i can't sit with someone else's pain without fixing it
The flight-to-action. Who didn't get to sit with yours growing up.
i avoid saying i love you first
The wait-and-see. Yeah. What's the cost been.
i pre-arrange disappointments so i won't be surprised
The rehearse-the-loss. Yeah. Is it working.
i undercut my own praise in front of others
The pre-empt-the-takedown. To feel safer or smaller.
i lie down for everyone except my mother
The selective fight. What does she get that no one else does.
i promise to call and i don't
The slow-fade. Who in particular.
i fall in love with the unavailable
The familiar shape. Yeah. Whose absence does it match.
i go cold before i know i'm hurt
The body knew first. Yeah.
i can't ask without preempting the no
The half-ask. Yeah. To soften whose disappointment.
i scan rooms for the most powerful person
The inventory-of-threats move. Yeah. What does it cost in attention.
i over-explain when i'm scared
The flood-of-words. Yeah. What are you hoping to ward off.
i can't let anyone help me move
The performance of self-sufficiency. What did needing help mean in your house.
i confess too early to people i barely know
The trauma dump. Yeah. What are you testing.
i make my work too important to be questioned
The fortress around the desk. What would softness reveal.
i ghost when things get serious
The vanish-at-the-edge. Yeah.
i compete with my mother by not needing her
The cold-mirror move. Was that her too.
i am the strong one in every group
The anointed bearer. Who chose you for it.
i hide my real opinions to keep my friends
The concealed self. What would happen if one of them saw it.
i become more myself when i'm angry, not less
The clarity through fire. Yeah.
i try to predict everyone's mood before mine
The weather-watching. Whose moods were dangerous growing up.
i mention my degrees when i feel small
The credential-armor. Yeah. What does small feel like.
i can't ask my partner for tenderness directly
The detour. Yeah. What does asking feel like.
i hold the relationship together while pretending i'm not
The invisible labor. Yeah. Who would you have to be if you stopped.
i can't accept being chosen
The reflexive duck. Yeah. What story does being chosen interrupt.
i make myself indispensable to keep being loved
The earned-love arrangement. What would unconditional feel like.
i pull back the moment i feel wanted
The flinch. Yeah.
my partner is mad at me again
For what.
my partner thinks i'm distant
Are you. About what.
we keep having the same fight
What's the actual subject under it.
my partner doesn't like my friends
Which ones. What's their reason.
my partner thinks i work too much
Do you.
my partner won't talk about money
How long. Whose family pattern is that.
my partner says i'm too sensitive
About what. Are you.
my husband shut down on me again
After what.
my partner hates my mother
With reason or not.
my wife thinks i'm not pulling my weight
With what. Are you.
my partner is angry and won't tell me why
Have you asked directly. What's your guess.
we're not having sex anymore
Since when. Have you talked about it.
my partner moved out for a week
After what. Are they coming back.
my partner found my old letters
From who. What did they read.
my partner thinks i'm hiding something
Are you.
we fight about chores constantly
What's the real fight underneath.
my partner is always late
To what. Have you said it directly.
my partner is jealous of my friend
Which friend. With reason or not.
my partner won't go to therapy with me
What did they say when you asked.
my partner went silent for two days
After what.
my husband thinks i drink too much
Do you.
my partner disapproves of my career
What did they say. How long has this been.
my partner forgot my birthday
Was it the first time.
my partner is annoyed at me about my mom
What did i do or say.
we had a huge fight last night
About what. Where did it start.
my partner thinks i'm depressed
Are you. What's their evidence.
my partner won't introduce me to his family
How long has it been. What does he say when you ask.
my partner thinks i'm jealous
Are you. About what.
my partner brought up the ex again
In what context. How often.
my partner won't share his passwords
Have you shared yours. What's the reason for asking.
my partner thinks i'm controlling
About what. Are you.
my partner snapped at me in front of friends
About what. Have you talked about it after.
my partner missed our anniversary again
How many times now.
my partner picked at my appearance
What did they say. First time.
my partner is mad about money again
Same fight. What's underneath.
my partner won't talk about kids
For how long. What was the last conversation.
my partner says i never listen
Do you. What did they say last.
my partner brought up the affair again
How long has it been since the disclosure.
my partner is stonewalling me
For how long. After what.
we never have the easy conversations anymore
When did the easy ones stop.
my partner doesn't want me writing about us
Have you been. What did they read.
my partner is sulking
After what. How long.
my partner accused me of being like my mother
In what way. Is it true.
my partner thinks therapy is useless
Said in what context. Is he the reason you're going.
my partner won't eat dinner with me anymore
For how long. What changed.
my partner is critical of how i parent
In what way. Have you talked about it directly.
my partner left the room when i started crying
Why was i crying.
my partner picked a fight on a hard day
Did they know it was hard.
i'm just tired today
Yeah.
i feel low
How long.
i'm sad and i don't know why
What's underneath.
i feel restless
Where in the body.
i'm anxious for no reason
There's a reason. Tell me what's loudest.
i'm just heavy today
Yeah. Did anything happen.
i feel disconnected
From what.
i'm in a fog
Since when.
i feel raw
What scratched.
i'm just worn out
Yeah. Did you eat.
i feel like i'm running on fumes
What's been pulling.
i feel hollow
Yeah. Tell me when.
i'm just blue
Yeah. How long.
i feel empty
Tell me where it started.
i'm exhausted but can't sleep
Yeah. What's looping.
i'm just over it
Over what.
i feel disoriented
Since when.
i feel small today
Yeah. Around what.
i'm just irritable
At who. About what.
i feel like i don't recognize myself
Since when.
i'm sad and trying not to be
Don't try. Tell me.
i'm so tired
Yeah.
i just feel off
What's the off pointing at.
i feel like crying for no reason
Cry. We can talk after.
i'm sad about things i can't name
Try one. Doesn't have to be right.
i feel detached
From what.
i feel unmotivated
For what specifically.
i'm in a weird mood
Weird how.
i'm too tired to pretend
Then don't.
i feel a kind of grief i can't place
For who. For when.
i'm just tender today
Yeah. Be tender.
i'm overwhelmed and can't say why
Then list one thing. Doesn't have to be the right one.
i feel like i used up my reserves
On what.
i feel emptied out
By who.
i'm just done
With what.
i feel lonely in a room with people
Yeah. Which people.
i feel like i'm fading
Tell me. How long.
i'm sad in a way that makes me quiet
Yeah. Don't have to talk.
i feel like a stranger to my own life
Since when. What changed.
i'm just tired of being the responsible one
Yeah. For who.
i feel old today
Yeah. Body or mind.
i'm wrung out
By what.
i feel like the joy went out
When did it start to leave.
